parameters.name: activeOnly
parameters.description: Optional: filter by active status (defaults to true if not specified)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look ahead

maxAmountPerOrder.title: Maximum amount per order (in cents). Default 5000000 (50k XAF) if not specified

estimatedDeliveryTimeDays.title: estimated_delivery_time in days - will be automatically calculated based on number of orders

reference.title: "Reference of the transaction. A valid UUID4",

signature.title: "jwt token. You can validate this request that is coming from

endpoint.title: "collect" or "withdraw". This shows the kind of

externalReference.description: The reference on the platform that initiated the transaction.

phoneNumber.title: The phone number that initiated the transaction

orderId.title: This is the external id from TrustPayWay

orderIndex.description:
order_index indicates which order (delivery) this item belongs to.
0 = first order, 1 = second order, etc. Defaults to 0 for single-order subscriptions.

soonestDeliveryDate.title: The soonest expected delivery date from associated orders (for admin sorting/coloring)
